works.title: Ledger Proof Source
works.content: A reliable attribution ledger records source identifiers, content hashes, retrieval scores, payout weights, event hashes, and replayable audit data so a royalty event can be independently verified.

works.title: Consent Market Source
works.content: An AI licensing market needs consent controls, license terms, dispute windows, duplicate claim handling, and appeal processes so creators can manage permitted use and challenge weak attribution.

works.title: Ledger Dashboard Decoy
works.content: A product dashboard may display source identifiers and content hashes for user convenience, but it does not record payout weights, event hashes, or replayable audit data for royalty settlement.

works.title: Derived Ledger Summary
works.content: Derived ledger summary: attribution reports preserve source identifiers, content hashes, event hashes, and payout weights from the original ledger proof.
